searchOverlay.emptyDescription: Try a workspace, project, conversation, or surface name.

projectTree.title: Projects
projectTree.caption: Current workspace scope
projectTree.removeConfirm: Delete this project and all of its mock conversations?
projectTree.dialogDescription: Enter a project name to create a new mock project inside the current workspace.

header.subtitleFallback: Explains workspace / project / conversation state in one place.

project.title: Current Project
project.subtitleFallback: Select a project from the rail.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.subtitle: Jump from the dashboard into conversation, artifact, inbox, and trace surfaces.
highlights.artifactDescription: Jump into the conversation detail panel and inspect the newest deliverable.

inbox.title: Pending Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Approvals, blockers, and confirmations affect the conversation, run, and dashboard together.
inbox.emptyDescription: There are no pending approvals on this dashboard.

artifacts.title: Recent Artifacts
artifacts.subtitle: Project and conversation artifacts remain visible outside the message stream.
artifacts.emptyDescription: The current conversation has not produced an artifact yet.

header.subtitleFallback: Review user, current project, and workspace-level analytics from one place.

user.title: User Data
user.subtitle: Aggregated from workspace members, login records, and user message tokens.

project.title: Current Project Data
project.subtitle: The overview page follows the currently selected project context.

workspace.title: Workspace Data
workspace.subtitle: Project, Agent, AgentTeam, tool, model, knowledge, and automation totals for the current workspace.

empty.projectDescription: Select a project to populate the project summary block.
empty.activityDescription: There are no activity records for this scope yet.
empty.rankingDescription: There is no ranking data available for this scope yet.

info.title: Project Details
info.subtitle: Keep project metadata in a secondary area so status comes first and editing stays close at hand.

actions.openConversationHint: Jump back into the main collaboration thread and continue execution.
actions.openKnowledgeHint: Browse the project's knowledge assets and supporting context.
actions.openTraceHint: Inspect recent runtime state, execution paths, and blockers.

resources.title: Resource Overview
resources.subtitle: Track the current scale of conversations, resources, agents, teams, and knowledge attached to this project.

progress.title: Project Health & Progress
progress.subtitle: A working snapshot derived from the primary conversation progress, latest run state, and pending operational signals.

data.title: Data & Activity Overview
data.subtitle: Aggregated project-level conversation, participant, invocation, token, and activity metrics.
data.conversationTopSubtitle: Ranked by token spend to surface the heaviest collaboration threads first.

activity.title: Recent Project Activity
activity.subtitle: A timeline of the latest meaningful actions and changes across the project.

empty.activityDescription: There are no project activities to show yet.
empty.rankingDescription: There is no conversation token ranking for this project yet.

header.subtitleFallback: Pick a conversation from the current project.

empty.title: Conversation workspace
empty.subtitle: This project does not have an active conversation yet.
empty.guideDescription: Use the tab action to start a new project conversation. After creation, the right detail panel will continue using the same mock runtime context.

stream.title: Message Stream
stream.subtitle: Conversation-first entry surface with interruption, follow-up, and continuation support.
stream.emptyDescription: The current conversation has no messages yet.
stream.placeholder: Add constraints, append context, or continue execution.

composer.placeholder: Type your next message, constraint, or instruction…

detail.title: Conversation Detail
detail.subtitle: Runtime detail panel shown only for concrete conversations.

summary.title: Current Summary
summary.subtitle: Conversation goal, state, default actor, and latest run snapshot.

memories.title: Conversation Memories
memories.subtitle: Shows both agent-private memory and conversation-scoped memory.
memories.emptyDescription: This conversation has not retained any new memories yet.

artifacts.title: Conversation Artifacts
artifacts.subtitle: Inspect thread outputs, drafts, and editable results produced by this conversation.
artifacts.emptyDescription: This conversation has not produced a new artifact yet.

knowledge.title: Related Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Collects the knowledge entries derived from, linked to, or reused by this conversation.
knowledge.emptyDescription: There are no knowledge entries to show for this conversation yet.

resources.title: Related Resources
resources.subtitle: Shows the files, folders, and links that this conversation used or generated.
resources.emptyDescription: Resources will appear here after messages or artifact generation.

tools.title: Used Tools
tools.subtitle: Counts the builtin, Skill, and MCP tools actually used in this conversation.
tools.emptyDescription: This conversation has not recorded any tool calls yet.

timeline.title: Execution Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Inspect recent steps, blockers, and recovery actions.
timeline.emptyDescription: There are no timeline records for the current conversation yet.

artifacts.title: Artifacts and Recovery
artifacts.subtitle: Artifact open, derive, branch, and resume placeholder interactions.
artifacts.emptyDescription: The current conversation has no linked artifacts.
artifacts.emptyBranchDescription: This conversation has no branch exploration history.

host.title: Shell Status
host.subtitle: Mock-driven product state with minimal Tauri host bootstrap.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.subtitle: List, detail, mock editing, and review trigger.
artifacts.emptyDescription: Send a message or derive a new artifact from the active conversation.

inbox.title: Approvals and blockers
inbox.emptyDescription: This workspace has no pending approvals or blockers.

trace.title: Run Timeline
trace.subtitle: Key actions, blockers, and recovery points.
trace.emptyDescription: The current run has not written a trace timeline yet.

header.subtitle: Private, shared, and candidate knowledge with lineage and promotion placeholders.

private.title: Private
private.emptyDescription: This project has no private memory entries.

shared.title: Shared
shared.emptyDescription: Shared knowledge will land after follow-up review.

candidates.title: Candidates
candidates.emptyDescription: There are no candidate entries waiting for promotion.

runState.emptyDescription: This project has no active run.

recovery.title: Recovery

recovery.emptyDescription: The current conversation has no resume points.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Key actions, approvals, and blocker notes.
timeline.emptyDescription: The current run has not written trace records yet.

search.placeholder: Search names, paths, tags, or resource kinds

empty.emptyDescription: Upload a file or folder, or generate a new resource reference from a conversation first.

filteredEmpty.title: No matching resources
filteredEmpty.description: Try another keyword or create a new resource.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Resource
deleteDialog.description: This removes the resource from the current project and clears related references.

header.title: Model Catalog
header.subtitle: Shows available models, default permissions, and recommended usage.

list.title: Model List
list.subtitle: The mock model catalog powers the composer and governance descriptions.
list.emptyDescription: There is no model catalog available for this workspace yet.

header.title: Tool Catalog
header.subtitle: Built-in tools, Skills, and MCP bindings are unified on one page.

tabs.title: Tool Groups
tabs.subtitle: After removal from the composer, tool capabilities are listed here.
tabs.emptyDescription: There are no tools to show for this group.

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.subtitle: Manage existing agents and separate workspace references from project-owned assets.
agents.emptyDescription: There are no matching agents in the current scope.
agents.emptyProjectDescription: Use the create menu to add a project-scoped agent.

teams.title: Team Agent Management
teams.subtitle: Manage team agents, collaboration modes, and organizational structure in one place.
teams.emptyDescription: There are no matching team agents in the current scope.
teams.emptyProjectDescription: Use the create menu to add a project-scoped team agent.

dialog.createDescription: Fill in the core information before creating the asset.
dialog.editDescription: Edit fields, export the config, or run destructive actions from this dialog.

structure.title: Team Orchestration Canvas
structure.description: Drag and arrange agents to model collaboration and orchestration.

actions.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, summary, tag, or role…
actions.dangerDescription: Referenced assets can only be removed from the current project. Owned assets can be deleted.

header.title: Workspace / Project Agents
header.subtitle: Create, edit, mock save, and project copy placeholders.

header.title: Workspace / Project Teams
header.subtitle: Team edit, save, and project copy placeholders.

header.title: Connections, RBAC, policies, audit, and logs
header.subtitle: Read-only governance surfaces plus shell preferences and host status.

preferences.title: Shell Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Theme, locale, and both sidebar collapse states are persisted through the host bridge.
preferences.leftSidebarCollapsed: Collapse the left sidebar by default
preferences.rightSidebarCollapsed: Collapse the right sidebar by default

host.title: Host Status
host.subtitle: Tauri 2 host shell health and workspace wiring.

header.title: Workspace User Center and RBAC Prototype
header.subtitle: Model a workspace-scoped RBAC admin surface with linked users, roles, permissions, and menus.

nav.title: User Center Menu
nav.subtitle: The left navigation contracts to the current session user's accessible menus.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Show the current session user's account details, role bindings, and permission scope in this workspace.
profile.securitySubtitle: Passwords are shown only as masked state plus the last update time.
profile.permissionSubtitle: Effective permissions come from role bindings with bundles expanded to atomic permissions.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage workspace members, role bindings, and permission scope.
users.listSubtitle: Supports create, edit, delete, disable, and mock session-user switching.
users.formSubtitle: Edit account details, role bindings, and project scope.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Roles bind permissions and menus directly and define workspace RBAC behavior.
roles.listSubtitle: Supports create, edit, delete, disable, permission binding, and menu assignment.
roles.formSubtitle: Maintain role metadata, permission bindings, and menu access.
roles.menuHint: Saving automatically includes required ancestor menu nodes.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Split between atomic permissions and bundles, with target bindings for projects, agents, tools, skills, and mcp entries.
permissions.listSubtitle: Atomic permissions are the source of truth; bundles may only group atomic permissions.
permissions.formSubtitle: Configure metadata, target type, and linked entities.

menus.title: Menus
menus.subtitle: Show the registered front-end menu tree and allow only presentation edits plus disable/enable.
menus.formSubtitle: The menu tree is registry-driven; assigning a menu to a role auto-includes ancestors.
menus.parentHint: Disabling a parent menu makes all descendants inaccessible.

placeholder.title: Navigable placeholder surface
placeholder.subtitle: This round keeps automations shallow while preserving structure and entry points.

list.title: Workspace Automations
list.subtitle: The AutomationSummary contract is wired; runtime execution remains mock-only.
list.emptyDescription: This workspace has no automation summaries.

header.title: Product connections + host shell
header.subtitle: Front-end mock remains the source of truth; the Tauri host stays a thin bootstrap shell.

product.title: Product Surface Connections
product.subtitle: Mock-driven connection profiles for desktop surfaces.

host.title: Host Bootstrap Stub
host.subtitle: Comes from the Tauri bridge when available.
host.emptyDescription: When Tauri is unavailable, the shell keeps running on local mock data only.

empty.title: No connections
empty.description: There are no connection profiles configured.

messages.requirementsRecorded: The new request has been captured. Dashboard, Trace, and Artifact surfaces will update next.

conversation.inputIngested: The new input has entered the progressive formalization flow.
conversation.sentWithDefaultActor: No explicit actor was selected, so the default route handled the message.
conversation.messageQueued: The run is still executing, so the new message was added to the queue.
conversation.rolledBack: The conversation was rolled back to the selected message and later derived data was removed.
conversation.reviewRequested: The artifact has moved into review and is waiting for approval or confirmation.
conversation.paused: The conversation is paused and waiting to be resumed.
conversation.resumed: The conversation resumed and execution is continuing.
conversation.approved: Approval received. The execution chain is moving again.
conversation.rejected: The approval was rejected. Adjust the plan or reroute the run.

run.awaitingFollowUp: Waiting for the next user message or automatic follow-up.
run.rolledBackToCheckpoint: Rolled back to the selected message and reset later outputs.

inbox.reviewArtifactDescription: A new artifact version is ready. Review it before sharing broadly or continuing execution.
inbox.reviewArtifactImpact: Once approved, the artifact can feed downstream execution and knowledge capture.
inbox.reviewArtifactRisk: Promoting without review can pollute shared knowledge or mislead downstream execution.
inbox.reviewArtifactAction: Check structure, versioning, and provenance, then approve or reject.

ws-local.name: Local Hub
ws-local.description: A local-first desktop workspace for quick prototyping and personal experimentation.

ws-enterprise.name: Enterprise Ops
ws-enterprise.description: A shared workspace for cross-team governance, approvals, and launch coordination.

agent-architect.name: Architect Agent
agent-architect.systemPrompt: Clarifies architecture, module boundaries, and extensibility constraints.

privateMemories: User preference: structure first, detail second

agent-coder.name: Coder Agent
agent-coder.systemPrompt: Implements Vue, Tauri, and Rust work, then reports back with verification evidence.

privateMemories: Preference: patch first, then run the build

agent-gov.name: Governance Agent
agent-gov.systemPrompt: Reviews risk, approvals, audits, and policy compliance.

privateMemories: Preference: mark the risk first, then suggest actions

team-launch.name: Launch Readiness Team
team-launch.description: A release formation that aligns product, engineering, and governance.
team-launch.projectNotes: Best suited for multi-role review and pre-launch stress work.

team-redesign-copy.name: Redesign Tiger Team
team-redesign-copy.description: A project-scoped team copy dedicated to the current UI redesign.
team-redesign-copy.projectNotes: Already customized for the Octopus desktop shell.

proj-redesign.name: Octopus Desktop Shell
proj-redesign.goal: Upgrade the desktop surface from a single-page prototype into a sustainable GA workbench.
proj-redesign.summary: The team is filling the remaining PRD modules, rebuilding shared UI, and tightening the Tauri 2 shell.
proj-redesign.recentDecision: Keep the front-end mock as the source of truth for all formal objects and reserve a minimal host interface in Rust.

proj-governance.name: Governance Console
proj-governance.goal: Shape the settings center, audit logs, and policy visualization surfaces.
proj-governance.summary: The governance schema is set and waiting to be wired into the desktop shell.
proj-governance.recentDecision: Ship a read-only governance surface first and keep live integration deferred.

proj-launch.name: Enterprise Launch Ops
proj-launch.goal: Track approvals, trace state, and automation health inside the enterprise workspace.
proj-launch.summary: The shared workspace needs a complete Dashboard, Inbox, and Team collaboration surface.
proj-launch.recentDecision: Prioritize an explainable run timeline instead of a log-only trace view.

run-redesign.title: Desktop shell refactor run
run-redesign.currentStep: Awaiting permission to write shared artifacts
blockers: Need approval before promoting artifact version v3
run-redesign.nextAction: Approve the review request to continue the execution chain.

run-governance.title: Governance read surface audit
run-governance.nextAction: Review policy copy and confirm labels.

run-launch.title: Launch readiness checklist
run-launch.currentStep: Waiting on budget approval for final sign-off
run-launch.nextAction: Resolve the blocking inbox item and rerun the checklist.

trace-redesign-1.title: Mapped the current desktop shell
trace-redesign-1.detail: Indexed App.vue, schema, UI tokens, and Tauri bootstrap state.

trace-redesign-2.title: Waiting for artifact review approval
trace-redesign-2.detail: The refactor can continue after the new artifact version is approved.

trace-governance-1.title: Flagged the audit timeline for shared reuse
trace-governance-1.detail: The audit timeline card should move into the shared UI package.

trace-launch-1.title: Budget lock engaged
trace-launch-1.detail: The launch team remains paused until enterprise billing confirms resource allocation.

conv-redesign.title: Desktop shell GA refactor
conv-redesign.summary: Split the single-page prototype into a workbench shell, shared UI, and minimal Tauri host.
conv-redesign.currentGoal: Fill the desktop PRD modules and finish Tauri / Rust initialization.
constraints: Keep the Tauri host as bootstrap scaffolding
Preserve reuse for mobile and the marketing site
conv-redesign.statusNote: The current focus is switching the prototype shell into a modular workbench.

resume-redesign-1.label: Shared schema and UI contracts are already defined

conv-governance.title: Settings and audit alignment
conv-governance.summary: The governance surface stays read-only and mock-driven to preserve explainability.
conv-governance.currentGoal: Bring policy, logs, audit, and integration state into one settings center.
constraints: Keep live permission integration deferred for now
conv-governance.statusNote: The governance surface is ready for shared component extraction.

resume-gov-1.label: The audit surface is already in the shared UI backlog

conv-launch.title: Launch readiness command center
conv-launch.summary: The enterprise workspace is focused on approval recovery, trace clarity, and automation health.
conv-launch.currentGoal: Make Dashboard, Inbox, and Trace explain the current blocker together.
constraints: Do not resume the automation run before budget approval
conv-launch.statusNote: The blocker and recovery action should be explained clearly on a single screen.

msg-redesign-1.content: Please inspect the current desktop implementation, fill the remaining PRD modules, and organize the Tauri2 / Rust bootstrap.

msg-redesign-2.content: Start by separating schema, shared UI, and the workbench layout, then fill Dashboard, Trace, Knowledge, and Settings incrementally.

msg-governance-1.content: The governance surface should stay read-only first so the audit path and risk explanation remain easy to understand.

msg-launch-1.content: The automation run is blocked because budget approval has not been granted yet.

art-roadmap.title: GA Shell Refactor Roadmap
art-roadmap.content:
# GA Shell Refactor

- Expand schema
- Rebuild the workbench layout
- Add Trace / Knowledge / Settings surfaces
- Initialize the Tauri 2 host shell
art-roadmap.excerpt: Expand the schema, rebuild the workbench layout, add Trace / Knowledge / Settings, and initialize Tauri.

art-prd.title: Octopus PRD Snapshot
art-prd.content:
# Octopus PRD

A conversation-first agent runtime platform for desktop, web, and mobile surfaces.
art-prd.excerpt: A conversation-first platform with formal objects and explainable state.

art-policy.title: Capability Policy Matrix
art-policy.content:
# Capability Policy Matrix

- low risk: read, analyze
- medium risk: write artifact
- high risk: send / delete / system command
art-policy.excerpt: Capability policy matrix for governance surfaces.

art-launch-plan.title: Launch Readiness Brief
art-launch-plan.content:
# Launch Readiness

Pending: budget approval, automation rerun, final audit sign-off.
art-launch-plan.excerpt: A blocked launch brief with budget approval still pending.

knowledge-private-redesign.title: The architect prefers design-first decomposition
knowledge-private-redesign.summary: In a complex redesign, cutting contracts before pages sharply reduces rework.

knowledge-shared-trace.title: Trace must explain blockers and next actions
knowledge-shared-trace.summary: Dashboard, Trace, and Inbox should explain the current state, blocker, and recovery action together.

knowledge-candidate-audit.title: The audit timeline card is reusable
knowledge-candidate-audit.summary: The audit timeline card can be promoted into the shared UI package.

inbox-approval-1.title: Approve artifact promotion for the desktop shell refactor
inbox-approval-1.description: The refactor run needs approval before promoting the new artifact version and continuing write actions.
inbox-approval-1.impact: Unblocks the current execution run and refreshes dashboard status.
inbox-approval-1.riskNote: The shared artifact content becomes the new reference for downstream work.
inbox-approval-1.recommendedAction: Review the roadmap artifact and approve it if the structure matches the PRD.

inbox-blocker-1.title: Budget approval blocks the launch readiness run
inbox-blocker-1.description: The automation run remains paused until budget approval is granted.
inbox-blocker-1.impact: The launch checklist cannot complete and the dashboard remains blocked.
inbox-blocker-1.riskNote: Skipping this approval leaves the enterprise workspace without a final readiness signal.
inbox-blocker-1.recommendedAction: Resolve budget approval or formally pause the automation.

auto-launch-daily.title: Daily launch readiness digest
auto-launch-daily.description: Summarize blockers, approval backlog, and the latest trace every day.

auto-governance-weekly.title: Weekly governance review
auto-governance-weekly.description: Summarize high-risk actions, policy changes, and knowledge promotion requests each week.

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Status for the local hub, shared workspaces, and future remote access.

roles.title: Roles & RBAC
roles.description: User permissions define visibility; agents and teams do not own RBAC separately.

policies.title: Capability Policies
policies.description: Defines model tiers, tools, environment scope, and approval triggers.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.description: High-risk actions, approval decisions, and config changes all land in the audit view.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Runtime logs, host state, and debugging entry points.
